hyperedges.label: Core Agent Trio: Planner, Implementer, Reviewer
Core Config-to-Generation Pipeline: fleet.yaml drives LiteLLM and Ollama config

Skill Template -> Plugin Skill Dual-Path Pattern (Bootstrap, Operations, Setup)
Dashboard Four-Panel UI Layout (Node Health, Agent Routing, Trace Stream, Warmup)
Fleet Lifecycle: Setup -> Generate Files -> Operate via Operations Skill
